name: KnownDLLs — DLL Search Hijack Prevention
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Lists DLLs that Windows pre-loads from System32, bypassing the normal DLL search order. Any DLL listed here cannot be hijacked via search-order manipulation.
forensic_value: Attackers remove DLL names from KnownDLLs to re-enable search-order hijacking for those libraries. Adding unexpected entries can force a malicious DLL to always load from a fixed path.
